summary: W-9 UI fixes verified: 1) W-9 Documents sidebar only shows approve icon (no trash), 2) Edit Employee Modal View W-9 button works on mobile (uses link.click), 3) Employee Portal View/Download W-9 buttons work (uses link.click), 4) Backend datetime fix working correctly

w9_sidebar_trash_icon_removed.details: W-9 Documents sidebar in viewer modal only shows approve icon for non-approved documents - NO trash icon in sidebar

w9_footer_has_delete_button.details: Delete button is appropriately placed in modal footer only

edit_employee_view_w9_mobile.details: Edit Employee Modal W-9 section shows view/download/delete buttons, view W-9 uses link.click() for mobile compatibility

employee_portal_view_w9_mobile.details: Employee Dashboard shows 3 W-9 documents with Eye (view) and Download icons, view W-9 uses link.click() method

employee_portal_download_blank_w9.details: Download blank W-9 form button uses link.click() method - opens IRS W-9 PDF

backend_datetime_fix.details: /api/admin/employee/{id}/summary endpoint returns 200 with proper period_start/period_end - datetime timezone comparison working

admin_dashboard_w9_sidebar.finding: Sidebar only has CheckCircle approve button for doc.status !== 'approved' - NO Trash2 icon in sidebar

admin_dashboard_edit_modal_view_w9.finding: Uses link.click() method: const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; link.target = '_blank'; link.click()

employee_dashboard_view_w9.finding: Uses link.click() method for view W-9 button

employee_dashboard_blank_w9.finding: handleDownloadBlankW9 uses link.click() method for IRS W-9 form download

backend_datetime_fix.finding: period_start datetime is made timezone-aware before comparison with now: if period_start.tzinfo is None: period_start = period_start.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All W-9 UI fixes verified via Playwright)

test_credentials.admin_login: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Lisa Martinez with 3 W-9 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All W-9 UI issues fixed: 1) Sidebar only has approve icon, 2) View buttons use link.click() for mobile compatibility, 3) Backend datetime timezone comparison fixed. Employee Lisa Martinez has 3 W-9 documents for testing.
